Package com.app.controller

Class DeliveryBoyController

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.app.controller.DeliveryBoyController
  • @RestController
@RequestMapping("/deliveryBoy")
@CrossOrigin(origins="*")
@Validated
public class DeliveryBoyController
extends java.lang.Object
